what: Submit vault registration request to the backend
why: POST /api/vault with vault_type dispatches to the correct backend flow. For git: tests access, clones repo, indexes. For local: creates directory in ~/.nori/vaults/, writes config, indexes.

success_handling.criteria: Backend confirms the vault is registered and the index is built — SSE completed event received

error_handling.description: Show error that git credentials are invalid or repository is inaccessible
Show error that repository cloning failed
Show error that a vault with this name already exists in ~/.nori/vaults/
Show error that the backend is unreachable

decisions.reason: Single endpoint dispatches based on vault_type field
decisions.rationale: Both vault types share the same POST /api/vault endpoint. The server reads vault_type from the body to route to the correct flow. This avoids two separate API endpoints and keeps the FE contract simple.
